---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability for the cineby_app shell
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What is the user-facing problem this would solve? (Not "what should it do" — "what should users be able to do.")

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about, and why is your proposal better?

## Affected surfaces

Check all that apply:

- [ ] `lib/features/webview/` — WebView, JS bridge, URL handling
- [ ] `lib/features/player/` — Native video player
- [ ] `lib/features/downloads/` — Download manager
- [ ] `lib/shared/navigation/` — App shell, bottom nav, FAB
- [ ] `lib/core/services/` — Providers, JS injection
- [ ] Android-specific (`android/`)
- [ ] iOS-specific (`ios/`)
- [ ] Build / CI (`.github/workflows/`)

## Out of scope

- Rebuilding cineby.at's UI in Flutter (the WebView IS the UI by design)
- Calling TMDB directly
- Anything that requires a custom backend

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, references, etc.
